# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:

env:
  ARTIFACT_NAME: build-artifacts
  ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS: 30

permissions:
  contents: read
  id-token: write

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    outputs:
      artifact-id: ${{ steps.upload.outputs.artifact-id }}
      build-version: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
    
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit
          disable-sudo: true
          
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
          persist-credentials: false
          
      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'
          
      - name: Generate Build Version
        id: version
        run: |
          VERSION=$(date +'%Y%m%d')-${GITHUB_SHA::8}
          echo "version=${VERSION}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "Build version: ${VERSION}"
          
      - name: Install Dependencies
        run: |
          npm ci --ignore-scripts
          npm audit --audit-level=high
          
      - name: Run Security Scan
        run: |
          npm audit --production
          
      - name: Run Tests
        run: |
          npm test
          
      - name: Build Application
        run: |
          npm run build
          echo "${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}" > dist/VERSION
          
      - name: Generate SBOM
        run: |
          npm install -g @cyclonedx/cyclonedx-npm
          cyclonedx-npm --output-file dist/sbom.json
          
      - name: Create Artifact Manifest
        run: |
          cat > dist/manifest.json << EOF
          {
            "version": "${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}",
            "commit": "${GITHUB_SHA}",
            "branch": "${GITHUB_REF_NAME}",
            "build_time": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)",
            "workflow_run": "${GITHUB_RUN_ID}"
          }
          EOF
          
      - name: Upload Build Artifacts
        id: upload
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: |
            dist/**
            !dist/**/*.map
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}
          if-no-files-found: error
          compression-level: 9

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scanning
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    permissions:
      contents: read
      security-events: write
    
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit
          disable-sudo: true
          
      - name: Download Artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: ./artifacts
          
      - name: Verify Artifact Integrity
        run: |
          if [ ! -f ./artifacts/VERSION ]; then
            echo "Error: VERSION file not found"
            exit 1
          fi
          if [ ! -f ./artifacts/manifest.json ]; then
            echo "Error: manifest.json not found"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Artifact version: $(cat ./artifacts/VERSION)"
          
      - name: Scan for Secrets
        run: |
          docker run --rm -v $(pwd)/artifacts:/scan trufflesecurity/trufflehog:latest filesystem /scan --no-update --fail
          
      - name: Container Security Scan
        run: |
          echo "Running container security scan..."

  deploy-staging:
    name: Deploy to Staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build, security-scan]
    environment:
      name: staging
      url: https://staging.example.com
    permissions:
      contents: read
      id-token: write
    
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit
          disable-sudo: true
          
      - name: Checkout Deployment Scripts
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          sparse-checkout: |
            scripts/deploy
          persist-credentials: false
          
      - name: Download Build Artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: ./deploy-artifacts
          
      - name: Verify Artifact Checksum
        run: |
          cd deploy-artifacts
          find . -type f -exec sha256sum {} \; > checksums.txt
          cat checksums.txt
          
      - name: Display Deployment Info
        run: |
          echo "Deploying version: $(cat ./deploy-artifacts/VERSION)"
          echo "Environment: staging"
          cat ./deploy-artifacts/manifest.json
          
      - name: Configure AWS Credentials
        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4
        with:
          role-to-assume: ${{ secrets.AWS_ROLE_STAGING }}
          aws-region: us-east-1
          role-session-name: GitHubActions-Staging
          
      - name: Pre-deployment Validation
        run: |
          chmod +x scripts/deploy/validate.sh
          scripts/deploy/validate.sh staging
          
      - name: Deploy to Staging
        run: |
          chmod +x scripts/deploy/deploy.sh
          scripts/deploy/deploy.sh staging ./deploy-artifacts
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: staging
          BUILD_VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}
          
      - name: Run Smoke Tests
        run: |
          chmod +x scripts/deploy/smoke-test.sh
          scripts/deploy/smoke-test.sh staging
          
      - name: Create Deployment Record
        run: |
          cat > deployment-record.json << EOF
          {
            "environment": "staging",
            "version": "${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}",
            "deployed_at": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)",
            "deployed_by": "${GITHUB_ACTOR}",
            "workflow_run": "${GITHUB_RUN_ID}"
          }
          EOF
          cat deployment-record.json

  integration-tests:
    name: Integration Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: deploy-staging
    permissions:
      contents: read
    
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit
          disable-sudo: true
          
      - name: Checkout Test Scripts
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          sparse-checkout: |
            tests/integration
          persist-credentials: false
          
      - name: Setup Test Environment
        run: |
          npm ci --ignore-scripts
          
      - name: Run Integration Tests
        run: |
          npm run test:integration
        env:
          TEST_ENV: staging
          TEST_URL: https://staging.example.com

  deploy-production:
    name: Deploy to Production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build, integration-tests]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    environment:
      name: production
      url: https://production.example.com
    permissions:
      contents: read
      id-token: write
    
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit
          disable-sudo: true
          
      - name: Checkout Deployment Scripts
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          sparse-checkout: |
            scripts/deploy
          persist-credentials: false
          
      - name: Download Build Artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: ./deploy-artifacts
          
      - name: Verify Production Artifacts
        run: |
          if [ ! -f ./deploy-artifacts/VERSION ]; then
            echo "Error: VERSION file missing"
            exit 1
          fi
          if [ ! -f ./deploy-artifacts/manifest.json ]; then
            echo "Error: manifest.json missing"
            exit 1
          fi
          VERSION=$(cat ./deploy-artifacts/VERSION)
          echo "Production deployment version: ${VERSION}"
          
      - name: Configure AWS Credentials
        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4
        with:
          role-to-assume: ${{ secrets.AWS_ROLE_PRODUCTION }}
          aws-region: us-east-1
          role-session-name: GitHubActions-Production
          
      - name: Pre-deployment Backup
        run: |
          chmod +x scripts/deploy/backup.sh
          scripts/deploy/backup.sh production
          
      - name: Pre-deployment Validation
        run: |
          chmod +x scripts/deploy/validate.sh
          scripts/deploy/validate.sh production
          
      - name: Deploy to Production
        run: |
          chmod +x scripts/deploy/deploy.sh
          scripts/deploy/deploy.sh production ./deploy-artifacts
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: production
          BUILD_VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}
          
      - name: Run Health Checks
        run: |
          chmod +x scripts/deploy/health-check.sh
          scripts/deploy/health-check.sh production
          
      - name: Run Smoke Tests
        run: |
          chmod +x scripts/deploy/smoke-test.sh
          scripts/deploy/smoke-test.sh production
          
      - name: Create Production Deployment Record
        run: |
          cat > deployment-record.json << EOF
          {
            "environment": "production",
            "version": "${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}",
            "deployed_at": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)",
            "deployed_by": "${GITHUB_ACTOR}",
            "workflow_run": "${GITHUB_RUN_ID}",
            "commit": "${GITHUB_SHA}"
          }
          EOF
          cat deployment-record.json
          
      - name: Notify Deployment Success
        if: success()
        run: |
          echo "Production deployment successful"
          echo "Version: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}"

  rollback:
    name: Rollback Production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: failure() && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    needs: deploy-production
    environment:
      name: production-rollback
    permissions:
      contents: read
      id-token: write
    
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit
          disable-sudo: true
          
      - name: Checkout Rollback Scripts
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          sparse-checkout: |
            scripts/deploy
          persist-credentials: false
          
      - name: Configure AWS Credentials
        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4
        with:
          role-to-assume: ${{ secrets.AWS_ROLE_PRODUCTION }}
          aws-region: us-east-1
          role-session-name: GitHubActions-Rollback
          
      - name: Execute Rollback
        run: |
          chmod +x scripts/deploy/rollback.sh
          scripts/deploy/rollback.sh production
          
      - name: Verify Rollback
        run: |
          chmod +x scripts/deploy/health-check.sh
          scripts/deploy/health-check.sh production
